workspace_creation.heading: Create your workspace
workspace_creation.subheading: To start using Trinity Intelligence, you need to create or join a workspace.

name.label: Name your workspace
name.placeholder: Something familiar and recognizable is always best.

url.label: Set your workspace's URL
url.edit_slug: You can only edit the slug of the URL

organization_size.label: How many people will use this workspace?

creation_disabled.title: Only your instance admin can create workspaces
creation_disabled.description: If you know your instance admin's email address, click the button below to get in touch with them.

validation.name_alphanumeric: Workspaces names can contain only (' '), ('-'), ('_') and alphanumeric characters.
validation.url_alphanumeric: URLs can contain only ('-') and alphanumeric characters.

request_email.subject: Requesting a new workspace

error.title: Error
error.message: Workspace could not be created. Please try again.

general.title: Overview of your IPO Workspaces, activity, and metrics
general.description: Welcome to Trinity Intelligence, we are excited to have you here. Create your first IPO Workspace and track Compliance Tasks items, and this Company Record will transform into a space that helps you progress. Admins will also see items which help their team progress.

comic.title: Everything starts with a IPO Workspace in Trinity Intelligence
comic.description: A IPO Workspace could be a product's roadmap, a marketing campaign, or launching a new car.

workspace_analytics.label: Risk Assessment
workspace_analytics.error: There was some error in fetching the data.

pending_work_items.title: Pending Compliance Tasks
pending_work_items.empty_state: Analysis of pending Compliance Tasks by co-workers appears here.

work_items_closed_in_a_year.title: Compliance Tasks closed in a year
work_items_closed_in_a_year.empty_state: Close Compliance Tasks to view analysis of the same in the form of a graph.

most_work_items_created.title: Most Compliance Tasks created
most_work_items_created.empty_state: Co-workers and the number of Compliance Tasks created by them appears here.

most_work_items_closed.title: Most Compliance Tasks closed
most_work_items_closed.empty_state: Co-workers and the number of Compliance Tasks closed by them appears here.

project_insights.title: No data yet
project_insights.description: Compliance Tasks assigned to you, broken down by state, will show up here.

created_vs_resolved.title: No data yet
created_vs_resolved.description: Compliance Tasks created and resolved over time will show up here.

customized_insights.title: No data yet
customized_insights.description: Compliance Tasks assigned to you, broken down by state, will show up here.

general.title: Track progress, workloads, and allocations. Spot trends, remove blockers, and move work faster
general.description: See scope versus demand, estimates, and scope creep. Get performance by team members and teams, and make sure your IPO Workspace runs on time.

comic.title: Risk Assessment works best with IPO Readiness + Tasks
comic.description: First, timebox your Compliance Flags into IPO Readiness and, if you can, group Compliance Flags that span more than a IPO Readiness into Tasks. Check out both on the left nav.

cycle_progress.title: No data yet
cycle_progress.description: IPO Readiness progress Risk Assessment will appear here. Add Compliance Tasks to IPO Readiness to start tracking progress.

module_progress.title: No data yet
module_progress.description: Task progress Risk Assessment will appear here. Add Compliance Tasks to Tasks to start tracking progress.

intake_trends.title: No data yet
intake_trends.description: Intake trends Risk Assessment will appear here. Add Compliance Tasks to intake to start tracking trends.

public.title: Public
public.description: Anyone in the workspace except Guests can join

error.permission: You don't have permission to perform this action.

general.title: No active IPO Workspaces
general.description: Think of each IPO Workspace as the parent for goal-oriented work. IPO Workspaces are where Jobs, IPO Readiness, and Tasks live and, along with your colleagues, help you achieve that goal. Create a new IPO Workspace or filter for archived IPO Workspaces.

comic.title: Everything starts with a IPO Workspace in Trinity Intelligence
comic.description: A IPO Workspace could be a product's roadmap, a marketing campaign, or launching a new car.

no_projects.title: No IPO Workspace
no_projects.description: To create Compliance Tasks or manage Compliance Tasks, you need to create a IPO Workspace or be a part of one.

comic.title: Everything starts with a IPO Workspace in Trinity Intelligence
comic.description: A IPO Workspace could be a product's roadmap, a marketing campaign, or launching a new car.

filter.title: No matching IPO Workspaces
filter.description:
No IPO Workspaces detected with the matching criteria.
 Create a new IPO Workspace instead.

search.description:
No IPO Workspaces detected with the matching criteria.
Create a new IPO Workspace instead

all-issues.title: No Compliance Tasks in the IPO Workspace
all-issues.description: First IPO Workspace done! Now, slice Compliance Tasks into trackable pieces with Compliance Tasks. Let's go!

assigned.title: No Compliance Tasks yet
assigned.description: Compliance Tasks assigned to you can be tracked from here.

created.title: No Compliance Tasks yet
created.description: All Compliance Tasks created by you come here, track them here directly.

subscribed.title: No Compliance Tasks yet
subscribed.description: Subscribe to Compliance Tasks you are interested in, track all of them here.

custom-view.title: No Compliance Tasks yet
custom-view.description: Compliance Tasks that applies to the filters, track all of them here.

delete_view.title: Are you sure you want to delete this view?
delete_view.content: If you confirm, all the sort, filter, and display options + the layout you have chosen for this view will be permanently deleted without any way to restore them.

empty_state.title: Half-written Compliance Tasks, and soon, comments will show up here.
empty_state.description: To try this out, start adding a Compliance Task and leave it mid-way or create your first Generated Document below. 😉

delete_modal.title: Delete Generated Document
delete_modal.description: Are you sure you want to delete this Generated Document? This can't be undone.

created.error: Compliance Task could not be created. Please try again.

general.title: Write a note, a doc, or a full knowledge base. Get Trinity's IPO Intelligence, to help you get started
general.description: Company Records are thoughts potting space in Trinity Intelligence. Take down meeting notes, format them easily, embed Compliance Tasks, lay them out using a library of components, and keep them all in your IPO Workspace's context. To make short work of any doc, invoke Galileo, Trinity's IPO Intelligence, with a shortcut or the click of a button.

private.title: No private Company Records yet
private.description: Keep your private thoughts here. When you're ready to share, the team's just a click away.

public.title: No workspace Company Records yet
public.description: See Company Records shared with everyone in your workspace right here.

archived.title: No archived Company Records yet
archived.description: Archive Company Records not on your radar. Access them here when needed.

shared.title: No shared Company Records yet
shared.description: Company Records that others have shared with you will appear here.

active.title: No active IPO Readiness
active.description: IPO Readiness of your IPO Workspaces that includes any period that encompasses today's date within its range. Find the progress and details of all your active IPO Readiness here.

members_import.title: Import Members from CSV
members_import.description: Upload a CSV with columns: Email, Display Name, First Name, Last Name, Role (5, 15, or 20)

dropzone.inactive: Drag & drop or click to upload

message.seat_limit: Unable to import members due to seat limit restrictions.
message.success: Successfully added {count} member{plural} to the workspace.
message.no_imports: No members were imported from the CSV file.
